label: 3 Act story structure
value: Transform the user's input into a vivid, detailed, and emotionally resonant narrative scene. This scene must strictly adhere to a 3-act story structure, bringing the core elements of the input to life through immersive description and authentic dialogue:

label: Summarize
value: Act as an expert summarizer for a busy founder. Your Task: Create a concise, comprehensive, and factual summary of the provided text's main ideas.

label: Characters
value: Based on the text below, provide two sections: 1. A comma-separated list of individual character names. 2. A list of those same characters, each with a brief detail. Strictly exclude any plural groups or collective characters. Provide only the requested content without headers, introductions, or closing remarks.
